title: Roxy's Staff
description: This Recource pack adds REAL Roxy Migurdia's Staff to minecraft!! (And her hat as bonus)
body:
This Recource pack adds REAL Roxy Migurdia's Staff to minecraft!! (And her hat as bonus)

To get Roxy's Staff for yourself, rename the mace to "Roxy's Staff" or (if you are russian) "Посох Рокси"
If you want to get her hat, rename carved pumpkin to "Roxy's Hat" or "Шляпа Рокси"

Take the staff in your other hand to hide it behind your back

Download from [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/roxy-s-staff/)
